name: pdf-summarise-v015
description: Extract text from a document, ask an Ollama-served LLM to summarise, sanitise the model output (built into the ollama_chat tool), write the summary to disk. Defaults to minimax-m2.5; set the model input to switch (e.g. llama3.2, qwen2.5, mistral).

model.description: Ollama model name. Recommended: minimax-m2.7 (default; long-context, cloud-served), mistral-large-3 (general), qwen3.5 (general alternative), qwen3-coder-next (code), fredrezones55/Jan-code (small/fast code), fredrezones55/chandra-ocr-2 (OCR), mathstral (math).

system_prompt.default: You are a careful, factual summariser. Produce five bullet points; do not add information that is not in the source.

with.prompt:
Summarise the following document in five bullet points:

${steps.extract.content}

with.text: Document summarised by the LLM; output sanitised on the way back.
